name: Runtime Action Queue
controlling_principle: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
boundary: Static advisory prototype only. The action queue does not create tickets, send notifications, enforce actions, retrieve live evidence, perform live monitoring, or integrate with workflow systems.
purpose: Convert CyberShield findings into a prioritized executive action queue with owner, evidence gap, runtime action, recommended next move, and proof-ready status.

proof_ready_statuses.label: Not Proof-Ready
proof_ready_statuses.meaning: Required evidence or owner accountability is missing.

proof_ready_statuses.label: Partially Proof-Ready
proof_ready_statuses.meaning: A record exists, but caveats, assumptions, or verification gaps remain.

proof_ready_statuses.label: Proof-Ready with Caveats
proof_ready_statuses.meaning: Usable for internal reliance with limitations disclosed.

proof_ready_statuses.label: Proof-Ready
proof_ready_statuses.meaning: Ready for the stated reliance purpose, subject to prototype boundary.

queue_items.action_title: Verify vendor banking change before payment approval
queue_items.evidence_gap: Out-of-band bank verification and controller approval are missing.
queue_items.risk_if_wrong: Payment may be sent to fraudulent or unauthorized destination.
queue_items.recommended_next_move: Perform approved out-of-band verification, document callback evidence, and attach controller approval before release.
queue_items.prototype_boundary: Advisory only. CyberShield does not verify banking details or block payment systems.

queue_items.action_title: Define CUI boundary before relying on CMMC readiness posture
queue_items.evidence_gap: CUI boundary, system inventory, data flow, and vendor flow-down evidence are missing.
queue_items.risk_if_wrong: CMMC scope, cost, timeline, and remediation priority may be materially wrong.
queue_items.recommended_next_move: Map CUI/FCI systems, users, vendors, data flows, and required controls before board or customer reliance.
queue_items.prototype_boundary: Advisory only. CyberShield does not certify CMMC readiness or make legal determinations.

queue_items.action_title: Confirm approved AI tool inventory and permitted data classes
queue_items.evidence_gap: Approved AI tool list, user access list, vendor data-use terms, and data class rules are assumed or missing.
queue_items.risk_if_wrong: Sensitive, proprietary, regulated, or customer data may be exposed to unapproved AI systems.
queue_items.recommended_next_move: Confirm approved tools, data-use boundaries, and user access before allowing company or client data in AI systems.
queue_items.prototype_boundary: Advisory only. CyberShield does not detect live AI usage or enforce AI tool restrictions.

queue_items.action_title: Generate Proof Pack before high-stakes reliance
queue_items.evidence_gap: Proof Pack exists as prototype text output and requires evidence validation before external use.
queue_items.risk_if_wrong: Leadership may brief, publish, or rely on unsupported conclusions.
queue_items.recommended_next_move: Review Proof Pack, verify missing evidence, and regenerate the board narrative before external reliance.
queue_items.prototype_boundary: Advisory only. CyberShield does not deliver reports or validate external reliance.
